headline: Seagate, Western Digital, FormFactor, Amkor, and Teradyne Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the morning session after dip buyers returned to the market to capitalize on more attractive valuations following the sector's steep selloff in the previous week, driven by continued optimism surrounding the long-term artificial intelligence investment cycle. headline: Seagate (STX) Stock May Be 34% Undervalued On Fresh AI Demand News
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings has delivered a very large 3 year gain, yet its current checks show a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value that sits below the market price while the usual market multiples point to something closer to fair. This leaves investors weighing how much of the story is already reflected in the stock. Over the past 3 years, Seagate has returned about 13.5x, which puts even modest shifts in expectations under a brighter spotlight for valuation. Expectations around...
